$comment: Pre-registered slice manifest for the divergence campaign. SHA-pinned, chronological, immutable after the first real run except by a dated amendment note (see README.md). Consumed by plan 02's harness; auditable stand-alone. All SHAs are from the pinned source snapshot recorded in source-repo.md.
slice_boundary_rule: Each slice is the set of commits on the first-parent-inclusive chronological history (git log --reverse) whose author/commit date (git --date=short) falls in [date_start, date_end] inclusive. first_commit/last_commit are the earliest/latest commit in that window. Slices are contiguous and gapless: slice 1 begins at the repository root commit, slice 10 ends at source_head, and the ten commit_counts sum to the full history (3685).

structural_events.$comment: Criterion-2 requirement: the sliced history jointly contains at least one rename, one revert, and one supersession/deprecation. Each event is named here with the slice it falls in and the commit that carries it, verified against the pinned snapshot.

rename.detail: git rename-detection R086: docs/demo_ideas.md renamed to docs/dogfooding.md

revert.detail: Revert "fix(codegen): rc-inc nested bare-shared field in callee-owned entry-copy (B-2026-07-09-12 render UAF)"; the reverted commit is af97e03eaafadef852b64f4d57dc0c3a2cc8d4c2

supersession.detail: feat(typechecker): #[unstable]/#[deprecated] lint at method/assoc-fn calls — introduces the deprecation surface
refactor(cli): remove the paired component form, superseded by the embedded-WIT component default landed in ad2ef65142182f907cb944247e4572b6b0e26963 (same day)
